{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = The Eighth Division
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Eighth Division]] is located on a floating junk heap.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Sir, we need to deliver him directly to the Eighth Division.” ... “Fine. Let’s go. It’s the floating junk heap over there.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
